executives.name: Alice Wong
executives.background: Alice Wong is Senior Vice-President and Chief Corporate Officer. She has been with Cameco for over 30 years, holding various leadership positions in marketing, corporate responsibility, and human resources.

executives.name: Dale Verran
executives.background: Mr. Verran is a Professional Geoscientist with over 20 years of experience in the mining industry. He was previously Vice President, Exploration for Denison Mines Corp. and has held senior roles with various exploration and mining companies.

executives.name: Elizabeth Freele
executives.background: Ms. Freele is the Vice President, Sustainability and Chief ESG Officer. She is a sustainability professional with over 15 years of experience in the natural resources sector, specializing in ESG strategy, risk management, and stakeholder engagement.

executives.name: Geoffrey Smith
executives.background: Mr. Smith is the Vice President, Corporate Development and Commercial. He is a corporate lawyer by training and has extensive experience in mergers and acquisitions, corporate finance, and commercial negotiations in the mining industry.

tenure_dates.title: Vice President, Corporate Development and Commercial

executives.name: Kevin Himbeault
executives.background: Mr. Himbeault is the Vice President, Operations and Regulatory Affairs. He has over 25 years of experience in the mining industry, with a focus on environmental management, regulatory compliance, and operations in the uranium sector.

executives.name: Patricia Volker
executives.background: Ms. Volker is a director and a CPA, CA. She has extensive experience in financial reporting and corporate governance, having served in senior roles at the Ontario Securities Commission.

executives.name: Paul Kostuik
executives.background: Mr. Kostuik is a mining engineer with over 35 years of experience in the mining industry.

executives.name: David Cates
executives.background: Mr. Cates is the President and Chief Executive Officer of Denison and serves on the Board of Directors. He is a Chartered Professional Accountant (CPA, CA) and holds a Master of Accounting (MAcc) and a Bachelor of Arts (BA) degree from the University of Waterloo. Prior to his appointment as President and CEO, he served as Denison's Vice President Finance and Chief Financial Officer.

tenure_dates.title: President and Chief Executive Officer (2015–Present); Director (2018–Present); previously Vice President, Finance & Tax and Chief Financial Officer (2008–2015)

executives.name: Ron Hochstein
executives.background: Mr. Hochstein is the Chair of the Board. He is currently the President and CEO of Lundin Gold Inc. and has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry.

tenure_dates.title: Board Chair (Current), Director (Current), Former President and CEO

board_of_directors.name: Junlin Huang
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Huang is a director and is the nominee of Beijing Sino-Can Uranium Resources Co. Ltd. He has extensive experience in the uranium industry in China.
